mapper.sql: select f.file_id, f.file_name, f.original_name, f.file_url, f.file_path, f.file_suffix, f.file_size, f.file_category, f.access_scope, f.upload_user_id, f.download_count, f.status, f.create_by, f.create_time, f.update_by, f.update_time, f.remark, u.nick_name as upload_user_name, d.dept_name as upload_dept_name from campus_shared_file f left join sys_user u on f.upload_user_id = u.user_id left join sys_dept d on u.dept_id = d.dept_id
mapper.update: update campus_shared_file set del_flag = '2' where file_id in #{fileId}
update campus_shared_file set download_count = download_count + 1 where file_id = #{fileId}
